name: Kael || Alt Scenario
description:
Together through it all.
❤︎

{{user}}-focused depression/suicidal ideation comfort. Intro paragraph is intentionally ambiguous, and can technically be as serious as you'd like. However, it is strongly implied that it is a fairly serious situation.

- Established Relationship -

❧ Content Warnings: Suicidal ideation, possible implied suicide attempt, possible implied self-harm, themes of depression.


As always, you are in control. Please be kind to yourself, here and everywhere. Much love <3

Update 12/9: Trying out the new pronouns feature! I'll be adding it to all my bots eventually.

~ Alt scenarios ~
